CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Sep-17-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; not reported. (D501)

No appearances.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS TAM's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT is DENIED in part and GRANTED in part as follows:

The motion is MOOT as to the fifth cause of action for Quiet title since Plaintiff does not seek punitive damages for the fifth cause of action.

The motion is GRANTED as to the punitive damages allegation in the Second cause of action for Breach of Contract. Contractual causes of action do not support a basis for punitive damages.

The motion is also GRANTED as to the third cause of action for negligent misrepresentation. Punitive damages are not available for negligent misrepresentation. See Alliance Mortgage Co. v. Rothwell (1995) 10 Cal.4th 1226, 1241.

Cross-Defendant's Motion to Strike the claim of personal injury damages as to the second cause of action for Breach of Contract is GRANTED. Such damages are not available for a breach of contract.

Cross-Defendant's Motion to Strike the claim of emotional distress damages as to the second cause of action for Breach of Contract is DENIED. Cross-Claimant has sufficiently pled a preexisting relationship.

Cross-Defendant's Motion to Strike the Court the claim of emotional damages as to the third cause of action for Negligent Misrepresentation is DENIED. Cross-Claimant has sufficiently pled a preexisting relationship.

Cross-Defendant's Motion to Strike the claim of personal injury damages as to the third cause of action for Negligent Misrepresentation is GRANTED. Cross0-laimant failed to state sufficient facts.

Finally, leave to amend the complaint to allege causes of action for fraud and Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress is GRANTED.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
